publicSideBand: City-managed public-side replacement is completed at no additional cost under the phased Kendallville program
privateSideBand: Participating customers pay no additional cost for replacement through the city program
fullReplacementBand: Full replacement is described as no additional cost to the customer when the property participates in the city program
housingTypeAssumption: Kendallville publishes city-program cost coverage rather than contractor bid ranges
permitAssumption: Eligibility depends on annual notices phase-area selection and a signed right-of-entry form
restorationAssumption: Restoration and final scope are handled through the city-selected contractor process
methodologySummary: Kendallville ties its cost language to a phased city program that started potholing in March 2026 and replacement work in April 2026 rather than to an owner-sourced contractor estimate.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners avoid direct cost only when the property is inside Kendallville's active program workflow and the owner returns the required participation and right-of-entry materials after the annual notice cycle.
